artPrompt: A spectral inspection scene: a translucent hand fans out blank illegible cards floating above a beige desk, one card glowing cold cyan as it is plucked free, dust motes hanging in humming municipal light, towering cabinets receding into ivory haze, a faint arcane shimmer seeping from the paperwork, an unsettling stillness rendered tenderly, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Internal Audit
text: Look at target opponent's hand. You may choose a noncreature card from it. That player discards that card. Then they fill out a form explaining why they ever had it.
flavorText: Everything was in order. That, in itself, was deeply suspicious.
